description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior finishes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The structure is composed of multiple interlocking rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The front of the house includes a small landscaped area with greenery, enhancing curb appeal. The entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal overhang, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The house sits on a broad, paved lot, suggesting integration into an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with black and white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a layered, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry, large windows, and a landscaped area with greenery.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white facade, multiple windows, and the layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more windows and the continuation of the boxy, modern design.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional black and white sections and a glimpse of the landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door with minimal overhang, no porch, and a landscaped approach
